title: cardamine tenuirostris subsp. affinis
intro: Cardamine tenuirostris subsp. affinis is a subspecies of the Cardamine tenuirostris plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to possess various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
